para_trans: The Ministerial Cell Officer Cadre
Transfer of officers
Government of Maharashtra
the General Administration Department
GOVERNMENT ORDER NO. CAB-1026 / P.No.15 / PRASS-2
Madam Cama Marg, Martyrdom Rajguru Chowk,
Mantralaya, Mumbai - 400 032
Date: March 17, 2026
the Government Order
Regulation of transfers and discharge of government duties of Maharashtra Government employees.
As per Section 4 (4) and 4 (5) of the Prevention of Delay Act, 2005, the following are mentioned:
Inter-Departmental transfers are being made for administrative reasons of the Cell Officers of the Ministries.
He is being transferred and posted in the section shown in column-5 in front of his name.
It is: -
2. The above mentioned officers have been posted from the date 17.03.2026 (M.No.) to Rakana No. 4 from the section mentioned here.
Unilateral work is being done.
3. The order is an order of superannuation and fresh orders are to be issued by the departments concerned.
There's no need.
4. The transferred officers are directly or indirectly pressurised to cancel their transfer.
If brought, the actions of the concerned will be considered misconduct.
5. In the Government Circular No. Annexure-2022 / Q. No. 45/18 (R.V.C.), dated 25.08.2022
As mentioned, it is mandatory for the concerned cell officers to provide a transfer of charge certificate.
6. General Administration Department Information about joining this Cell Officer Department.
Submit to the Department of Administration (Section-2).
